name: Minted Pea and Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion, garlic, and potatoes in oil until softened.
2. Add chicken stock, frozen peas, and dried mint.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for about 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Remove from heat and puree the soup until smooth.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve in heated bowls topped with a swirl of yogurt.
